rules.title: Common Equity Tier 1 Minimum Ratio
rules.text: Institutions shall maintain a Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio of at least 4.5% of total risk exposure amount.

rules.title: Capital Conservation Buffer
rules.text: A capital conservation buffer of Common Equity Tier 1 capital equal to 2.5% of total risk exposure amount is required.

rules.title: Leverage Ratio Requirement
rules.text: Institutions shall maintain a leverage ratio of at least 3.0%, with G-SIIs subject to an additional leverage ratio buffer.

rules.title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio
rules.text: Credit institutions shall hold liquid assets to cover net liquidity outflows under stressed conditions over 30 days, with a minimum LCR of 100%.

rules.title: Other Systemically Important Institutions Buffer
rules.text: Competent authorities may require an O-SII buffer of up to 2.0% of total risk exposure amount for systemically important institutions.
